title: verbascum × nagelsii
intro: Verbascum × nagelsii, also known as Yellow Mullein or Mullein, is a biennial plant that belongs to the Scrophulariaceae family and is a hybrid of Verbascum blattaria and Verbascum lychnitis. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Verbascum × nagelsii include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and improve sleep quality, while also exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal properties. Verbascum × nagelsii can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used as a natural remedy in traditional medicine, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the individual and the specific preparation method used.
